events.text: Goal! Spain 1, Saudi Arabia 0. Lamine Yamal (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal with a cross.

Goal! Spain 2, Saudi Arabia 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Aymeric Laporte with a headed pass following a corner.
Goal! Spain 3, Saudi Arabia 0. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Dani Olmo with a headed pass.
Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Own Goal by Hassan Al Tambakti, Saudi Arabia. Spain 4, Saudi Arabia 0.
Mohamed Kanno (Saudi Arabia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
